subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath reached Our presence, and We have answered you with that which shall cause your remembrance to endure throughout the eternity of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابکما لدی الوجه و اجبناکما بما یبقی به ذکرکما بدوام الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
